title: Radioactivity
description: A mod that adds radioactive blocks and items to the game
body:
Radioactivity Mod - Harness the Power of Radiation
Radioactivity is a Minecraft mod that introduces the dangers and potential of nuclear energy. Mine Uranium Ore, refine it into Uranium Dust, and craft pure Uranium to unlock new possibilities. But be careful—radiation is not to be taken lightly.

Features:

Uranium Ore – A rare resource found deep underground.
Uranium Dust – A refined form of uranium used for further processing.
Uranium – A powerful but hazardous material with great potential.
Join our community for updates, discussions, and exclusive content:
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/pSewVG5fJe
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Neddiebones

Explore the power of radioactivity and discover its risks and rewards.
dev note- There are a few bugs if you know how to fix some ping me in my discord [https://discord.com/invite/pSewVG5fJe](https://discord.com/invite/pSewVG5fJe)
